findings.title: Format-filter classification is duplicated across Library and LibraryFormatModeTabs
findings.description: The same decision tree (empty â†’ all, single audiobook â†’ audiobooks, epub+pdf only â†’ ebooks, else â†’ all) appears as `getActiveMode` in LibraryFormatModeTabs.tsx and again in `activeFormatTab` / `activeModeLabel` in Library.tsx. `modeBooksForMedia` repeats the format branch for filtering. Any change to what counts as â€śebooksâ€ť or how combined filters behave must be edited in multiple places, with high drift risk.
evidence: Library.tsx activeFormatTab / activeModeLabel / modeBooksForMedia mirror getActiveMode + filter branches
LibraryFormatModeTabs defines getActiveMode locally without export
findings.suggested_fix: Export a single pure helper (e.g. `classifyLibraryFormatFilter(format): { tab, modeLabel, matchesBook }`) from a small `src/lib/libraryFormatFilter.ts` or colocate next to the store; have LibraryFormatModeTabs and Library.tsx import it. Optionally fold `modeBooksForMedia` filtering into the same helper output or a paired `filterBooksByFormatMode`.

findings.title: Source-scoped book list filtering is copy-pasted for counts vs hero shelf
findings.description: The `sourceFiltered` construction (`filters.source` narrowing ABS vs local) is duplicated between `modeBooksForMedia` and `LibraryFormatModeTabs` counts useMemo. Coupling is accidental, not domain-driven: both must stay in lockstep or counts and hero content diverge.
evidence: identical ternary on filters.source and absServerId predicate
findings.suggested_fix: Expose `selectBooksForLibrarySource(books, source)` from the book store or a tiny selector module and reuse in both places.

findings.title: Media-first default effect is a dense implicit state machine
findings.description: The effect chains `initialMediaFormatDefaultAppliedRef`, `prevFilterFormatRef`, and `libraryFormatCleared` sessionStorage with several early returns. The behavior is correct-by-comment but hard to verify without tracing transitions (empty library reset, session flag, user clear vs mixed initial empty). This raises the cost of safe changes for the next maintainer.
evidence: multiple early returns interleave sessionStorage IO and ref updates
prevWasNonEmpty vs isEmpty distinguishes user clear from mixed-library unset
findings.suggested_fix: Extract named pure functions (e.g. `readFormatClearedFlag()`, `computeDefaultFormatMutation(books, format, gates)`) and/or a short state comment block enumerating transitions. Prefer colocated unit tests for the pure piece over growing the effect inline.

findings.title: `prevFilterFormatRef` name undersells its role in transition detection
findings.description: `prev` reads as â€śprevious renderâ€ť but the ref is really the last format filter value the effect has synchronized for edge detection (user narrowed then cleared vs never-set empty in mixed libraries). Intent is only clear after reading the block.
evidence: prevWasNonEmpty && isEmpty drives sessionStorage user-clear path
findings.suggested_fix: Rename to e.g. lastSeenFormatForDefaultEffectRef or add a one-line comment at declaration describing clear-vs-initial-empty edge detection.

findings.title: Continue-tab empty state repeats `activeModeLabel === 'Items'` checks
findings.description: Four branches compare the same string literal for copy and CTA layout. A local boolean (`isItemsMode`) derived next to `activeModeLabel` would reduce repetition and make the JSX guard easier to scan.
evidence: activeModeLabel === 'Items' in headings, body, and conditional button groups
findings.suggested_fix: const isItemsMode = activeModeLabel === 'Items' immediately after activeModeLabel useMemo; use isItemsMode in JSX.

findings.title: sessionStorage key/value for format cleared is a magic pair
findings.description: `libraryFormatCleared` and `'1'` are stringly-typed and only documented by surrounding logic. Typos or future second callers will not get compile-time help.
findings.suggested_fix: Module-level `const LIBRARY_FORMAT_CLEARED_KEY = 'libraryFormatCleared' as const` and `const LIBRARY_FORMAT_CLEARED_VALUE = '1' as const` (or a 2-line comment + single export if other modules need the contract).

residual_risks.description: Adding new `Book.format` values or non-standard filter combinations will require touching several duplicated branches until M1/M2 are consolidated; regressions may show up only in UI (counts vs grid vs hero mismatch).

testing_gaps.description: No isolated tests visible for the auto-default effectâ€™s transition matrix: mixed library (no setFilter), single-format auto-apply, user chip clear + sessionStorage persistence, library emptied ref/flag reset. Pure extraction in M3 would make this tractable.
Items-mode empty state CTAs vs audiobook/ebook labels are UI-only; a regression test would lock the branching intended for mixed libraries.
